message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor white
}

title create file, add, reset, delete

participant "User" as User1 <<actor>> 
rectangle GIT {
    box Working dir #FF6B6B
        participant "" as WD1
    endbox
    
    header jalbertomr.blogspot.com
    
    box Stage #98FB98
        participant "" as STAGE1
    endbox
    
    box History #E0FFFF
        database DB1
    endbox
}

==create file2, add, reset, delete == 

note over WD1 :file2 created\n  
WD1 ->STAGE1:green **git** <u>add</u>**<font color=black > </font><b style="color:#347C2C">file2<b/>**\n   
note right of STAGE1:<back:red>:line:black;size:5;text:white;font size =10,file2 created \n  

stage <- stage:green [reset | reset file2| reset HEAD file2]\nnote left of STAGE1:\n    
note over WD1 :\nfile2 deleted from working directory.\n    

group git status -s
   alt Untracked files in red
      activate WD1
       note over WD1:**?? new_file.txt**
     deactivate WD1
   
else Files to be committed are green
activate STAGE1
         note over STAGE1 :**A added_file.txt**
deactivate STAGE1
  
 else Modified but not updated yellow
          activate WD1
           note over WD1:M modified_file.txt
            deactivate WD1
            
end


@enduml
